subject: [PATCH v3 4/8] io_uring/kbuf: return buffer id in buffer selection

2026-03-06.patch_summary: This patch modifies the io_uring/kbuf module to return the ID of the selected buffer in addition to its address and size when selecting a buffer for multishot I/O operations. This is necessary for kernel-managed buffer rings, which require the ability to recycle previously used buffers. The changes affect three files: include/linux/io_uring/cmd.h, include/linux/io_uring_types.h, and io_uring/kbuf.c. The modifications involve adding a new field to the struct io_br_sel data structure to hold the buffer ID and updating the io_ring_buffer_select and io_buffer_select functions to populate this field.
